free_text: FAST-NEUTRON TOTAL AND ELASTIC AND NON-ELASTIC
SCATTERING CROSS SECTIONS OF ELEMENTAL NICKEL
TEN CAREFULLY CALIBRATED PROTON RECOIL DETECTORS
. DETECTORS NORMALIZED TO COMMON RELATIVE VALUE BY
THREE INDEPENDENT SETS OF MEASUREMENTS MADE WITH A
RANGE OF NICKEL AND CARBON SAMPLES. EACH MEASUREMENT
EXTRAPOLATED TO THIN SAMPLE LIMIT. RESULTS WERE
AVERAGED OVER 200-KEV INTERVALS USING A RUNNING
RESULTS WERE AVERAGED OVER 200-KEV INTERVALS USING A
DISTRIBUTIONS NORMALIZED TO CARBON TOTAL CROSS SECTION
ASSUMING THAT THE ELASTIC AND TOTAL CROSS SECTIONS ARE
PROMPT NEUTRONS FROM THE SPONTANEOUS FISSION OF CF-252
USED TO ESTABLISH THE RELATIVE UNCERTAINTY OF EACH
CORRECTED FOR MULTIPLE EVENTS, INCIDENT BEAM
DETECTOR CALIBRATION ERRORS INCLUDE UNCERTAINTIES IN-
- CARBON MONITOR MEASUREMENTS, LESS THAN OR EQUAL TO
- CARBON REFERENCE STANDARD, LESS THAN OR EQUAL TO
- RELATIVE CF-252 MEASUREMENTS, LESS THAN OR EQUAL TO
CORRECTION UNCERTAINTIES ARE ESTIMATED TO BE 1-2
